title: Small Plant Pots Indoor, 6cm Cement Planter, Grey Plant Pot Indoor & Outdoor, Weather Resistant, Herb, Flower or Succulent Pots (Set of 3)
features: 3 Piece Set: A coordinated and contemporary design. These pots work well together to brighten a room or on their own. Good things do come in three’s!
Textured Cement Finish: Precision poured small plant pots made from 100% cement. A stable base and tough finish will keep your plants safe from accidents around the home
Indoor & Outdoor Durability: Engineered to be UV resistant and weather proof. Our concrete planters will comfortably withstand bleak winter weather even when your greenery may not
Perfect for Succulents, Herbs & Flowers: Ideal size for a succulent plant pot or as a small indoor flower pot
Unique Design: Bring some zen to your home and get your guests talking. A great housewarming gift for a fresh start with flora
description: Small planter pots, set of 3 Just add your favourite succulents, flowers or herbs to brighten any room. Succulents and cacti love cement planters as it allows water to evaporate quickly, preventing root rot. Cement pots also insulate against sudden temperature fluctuations. Grow flavoursome and aromatic herbs and keep them handy with these three helpful kitchen benchtop planters. Freshen your house with the natural scent of flowers, carefully arranged in decorative planters. Create a colour and fragrance masterpiece using all three mini planters together or space them out as window sill planters. Great for indoor or outdoor settings Incorporate our modern planters as styled elements into your home and outdoor living spaces. An excellent grey plant pot indoor but the concrete planter will also stand up to the elements outdoors. Designed to be tough and hard wearing, these cement pots are UV resistant and won’t fade in direct sunlight. Distinctive farmhouse decor Bring your rooms to life with some greenery and our unique cement plant pots. These small indoor plant pots work well as a centrepiece on the dining table, bookshelf or as window sill decoration. These pots combine a modern, family inspired design with classic farmhouse materials. For yourself or to share A memorable housewarming present or gift for friends and family.
